font-size: 100% !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
General Purpose Chatbot UI
provides an interactive frontend on port 3000

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rasa chatbot backend
provides NLU and stories

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rasa Custom Action
provides a custom implementation for handing specific questions to the question answering functionality

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Qanary System
orchestrates the connected Qanary components as demanded by the Rasa custom action

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AutomationServiceComponent
(Qanary component)
identifies names of persons in
a given question using a
pre-trained model

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BirthDataQueryBuilderWikidata
(Qanary component)
using the identified names,
it creates a SPARQL query that can
be used to fetch the requested
data from Wikidata

div.style: font-size: 100% !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SparqlExecuterComponent
(Qanary component)
executes the previously
computed SPARQL query on
Wikidata to fetch the
requested data

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Qanary Triplestore
stores all information for a question in a specific graph
(i.e., a global QA process memory)
here: a demo service of the WSE research group is used (a Stardog triplestore)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.a:
public SPARQL endpoint
for querying RDF data

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MLflow
logging of the training and usage
of the AutomationServiceComponent
(available on port 5000)
